name: Salmon Patties with Cucumber Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain, flake and remove bones from salmon.
2. Mix with bread, egg, milk, lemon juice and salt.
3. Divide into fourths.
4. Shape each into a patty; place in 8 inch square microwavable baking dish.
5. Cover with paper towel.
6. Microwave on 70% power for 6-7 minutes or until center is set, rotating the dish once.
7. Combine yogurt, cucumber, onion and dill.
8. Spoon sauce onto each patty.
